name: The World of Beastars
description:
Welcome to the World Of Beastars - From the Cherryton Academy to the Bustling City, even to the HQ of the Shishigumi, you can explore every single nook and cranny of the world in which these animals live.

(Dead Dove added - in case of anyone doing storylines involving devouring/violence, and of course - Melon's existence.)

[Character list as of now (more to be added if requested):

Carnivores/Omnivores: Legoshi, Juno, Bill, Jack, Collot, Miguno, Riz, Voss, Durham, Gouhin, Shiela, Melon, Gosha, Agata, Free, Ibuki, Dolph.

Herbivores: Louis, Haru, Pina, Cosmo, Azuki, Kyuu, Yahya, Seven, Ogma.]
creator: SpartacusBean
